name: AK-12 & AN-94 - Tropical Getaway
description:
“Isn’t it nice Commander? To just have a week of you, me, and AN-94 on vacation-“ “Commander… sand.”

The iconic duo of DEFY on vacation with their beloved Commander (aka you).

After somewhat gaining back my sanity, I’ve finally found some… ideas along the way. So found this image, and reminded me a lot of my actual life. So here, a bot of AK-12 and AN-94 with the scenario heavily inspired by my time on vacation in Boracay, Philippines. (Not so fun fact: This was the exact moment on when I learned about GFL in the first place. It was also the first time I’ve heard about Empty and his animations. R.I.P my guy.)

(Girls’ Frontline)

Art by shoukaki_(earthean) (I just found it on danbooru, the original source is no where to be found.)
creator: Pausdbutoon
